overall.description: A first-person perspective ride on the Del Perro Pier Ferris wheel in GTA V, ascending from ground level toward the apex. The clip captures the white metal structure with red cabins rotating against a clear blue sky, gradually revealing the Los Santos cityscape with modern skyscrapers, construction cranes, and distant highways.

scene_state.functional_zone: Ferris wheel ascent at amusement park pier

agents.ego_description: riding upward in a Ferris wheel cabin, rotating with the wheel structure and looking out at the emerging cityscape

entered.detail: large white metal framework with lattice support beams dominating the foreground
red enclosed passenger cabin with glass windows attached to the wheel rim
illuminated sign with 'LOS SANTOS' text mounted on the Ferris wheel structure
tall modern building with reflective glass facade and construction cranes nearby
yellow tower crane visible above the skyline indicating ongoing construction

segments.scene_description: The segment shows the initial ascent of a Ferris wheel ride with the white metal structure and red cabins filling the frame. The 'LOS SANTOS' sign is prominently visible on the wheel framework as the cabin rises, with distant skyscrapers and construction cranes visible against the clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated amusement ride overlooking downtown district

events.description: Ferris wheel rises above the lower structural elements, revealing the full downtown skyline with multiple high-rise buildings

agents.ego_description: continuing to rise on the Ferris wheel, now at mid-height with expanding views of the urban landscape and highway infrastructure

entered.detail: tall building with distinctive yellow and green facade under active construction
modern high-rise with prominent purple illuminated signage on its exterior
elevated highway interchange visible in the distance between buildings

segments.scene_description: As the Ferris wheel continues its rotation, the camera rises above the initial structural elements, revealing more of the Los Santos skyline. The yellow facade building and purple-lit skyscraper become prominent on the left and right respectively, while the highway infrastructure becomes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: panoramic apex view of urban downtown

events.description: Ferris wheel reaches the apex of its rotation, providing the highest elevation view before beginning the descent phase

agents.ego_description: reaching the top of the Ferris wheel rotation, looking down at the city streets with visible traffic and the dense cluster of downtown buildings

entered.detail: grid of urban streets with visible moving traffic and intersections below
low-rise parking garage with horizontal levels visible beneath the wheel

segments.scene_description: At the apex of the Ferris wheel ride, the camera captures a panoramic view of the Los Santos downtown district. The wheel structure now frames the bottom of the shot while the cityscape dominates the view, showing the yellow construction building up close, distant highways with moving vehicles, and the cluster of modern skyscrapers under the clear blue sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous ascent on a Ferris wheel that transforms from a close-up view of the ride's machinery into a sweeping panoramic vista of the Los Santos skyline. It begins with the white metal framework and red cabins filling the frame, passing the prominent LOS SANTOS sign as the cabin rises against a clear blue sky. As the rotation continues, the camera clears the initial structural elements to reveal the city's architecture, with a yellow facade building and a purple-lit skyscraper emerging on the periphery. The scene then expands as the ride reaches its apex, shifting the wheel structure to the bottom of the frame to make room for a dominant view of the downtown district. Finally, the perspective opens fully across the cityscape, showcasing a cluster of modern skyscrapers and distant highways with moving vehicles under the bright daylight.
